Our Digital Services

Browse our complete range of 40+ professional digital services. All services can be paid for with credits — save up to 20% compared to market rates.

Service Categories

🌐 Website Design Services

Custom websites & landing pages

  • Business Website — Professional multi-page website with responsive design, SEO optimization, and CMS integration. (640 credits)
  • Landing Page — High-converting single-page design focused on driving signups, sales, or leads. (240 credits)
  • Sales Funnel — Complete multi-step sales funnel with landing pages, upsells, downsells, and thank-you pages. (480 credits)
  • Brochure Website — Elegant informational website perfect for showcasing your business, portfolio, or services. (400 credits)

🛒 E-Commerce Stores

Online stores & optimization

  • E-commerce Store — Full-featured online store with product management, payments, shipping, and order tracking. (1200 credits)
  • Product Uploads — Bulk product upload service including titles, descriptions, images, and SEO metadata. (120 credits)
  • Conversion Optimization — Data-driven optimization of your e-commerce store to increase sales and reduce cart abandonment. (320 credits)

🎨 Logos, Graphics & Branding

Logos, brand kits & design

  • Logo Design — Custom logo design with multiple concepts, revisions, and complete brand-ready file package. (120 credits)
  • Brand Kit — Complete brand identity package including logo, color palette, typography, and usage guidelines. (320 credits)
  • Social Media Graphics — Eye-catching social media post designs, stories, and cover images for all platforms. (80 credits)

🔍 SEO Services

Search engine optimization

  • On-Page SEO — Comprehensive on-page SEO optimization including meta tags, content structure, and internal linking. (240 credits)
  • Technical SEO — Deep technical audit and fixes including site speed, crawlability, indexing, and Core Web Vitals. (320 credits)
  • Blog SEO — SEO-optimized blog content strategy with keyword research, content briefs, and publishing schedule. (200 credits)
  • Local SEO — Local search optimization including Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, and local content. (240 credits)

📝 Content & Copy

Copywriting & content creation

  • Website Copywriting — Persuasive, SEO-friendly website copy that converts visitors into customers. (160 credits)
  • Sales Page Copy — High-converting long-form sales page copy with proven frameworks and psychological triggers. (240 credits)
  • Digital Product Copy — Specialized copy for ClickBank, JVZoo, and digital product launches. (320 credits)

📧 Email Marketing

Automation & campaigns

  • Email Automation — Automated email sequences for onboarding, nurturing, sales, and re-engagement. (240 credits)
  • Lead Nurturing — Strategic email nurturing campaigns that build trust and move leads toward purchase. (200 credits)
  • Campaign Setup — Complete email marketing campaign setup with templates, lists, automation, and tracking. (160 credits)

📱 Social Media

Content packs & management

  • Monthly Social Pack — Full month of social media content including graphics, captions, hashtags, and scheduling. (320 credits)
  • Caption Writing — Engaging social media captions with hashtags, CTAs, and engagement hooks for your posts. (80 credits)

☁️ Website Hosting

Fast, secure managed hosting

  • Starter Hosting — Reliable shared hosting for small websites, blogs, and portfolios with 10GB SSD storage. (8 credits)
  • Business Hosting — Enhanced hosting for growing businesses with 50GB SSD, staging environment, and priority support. (24 credits)
  • Professional Hosting — High-performance dedicated resources with 100GB NVMe, auto-scaling, and white-glove support. (48 credits)
  • Enterprise Hosting — Fully managed, high-availability hosting with dedicated infrastructure and 24/7 VIP support. (120 credits)

📚 Digital Product Creation

We will design/build/create your entire digital product for you!

  • PDF / eBook Creation — Professional PDF documents, eBooks, lead magnets, and digital guides with stunning design. (160 credits)
  • Online Course — Complete online course creation including curriculum design, platform setup, and marketing materials. (640 credits)
  • SaaS Tool Development — Custom SaaS tool or micro-app development with user authentication, dashboard, and billing. (1600 credits)
  • Plugin Development — Custom WordPress or platform plugin development for specific business needs. (400 credits)

⚡ Additional Services

CRO, AI content & care plans

  • Landing Page Optimization — Conversion rate optimization for existing landing pages using data-driven strategies. (240 credits)
  • AI-Powered Content — AI-enhanced content creation including blog posts, product descriptions, and marketing copy. (120 credits)
  • Website Care Plan — Monthly website maintenance including hosting, security monitoring, backups, and updates. (40 credits)

✍️ Blog Setup

Complete blog creation in any niche

  • Blog Starter — Professional blog setup in your chosen niche with custom theme, essential plugins, and 5 launch posts. (400 credits)
  • Blog Professional — Advanced blog build with custom design, 15 posts, email capture, monetisation setup, and content strategy. (1000 credits)
  • Blog Authority — Premium authority blog with 30 posts, full SEO campaign, membership area, and 6-month growth strategy. (2400 credits)

🎬 Vlogging & Videography

Professional filming for YouTube & social media

  • Social Media Video Pack — Short-form video content pack for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. (300 credits)
  • YouTube Video Production — Full-day YouTube video production including filming, editing, thumbnails, and SEO-optimised descriptions. (800 credits)
  • Corporate & Promo Video — Professional corporate video, brand film, or promotional video for your business website and marketing. (1400 credits)
  • Monthly Video Retainer — Ongoing monthly video content package: 2 filming days producing 8+ videos for YouTube and social media. (2000 credits)
